title: pyrus × fallax
intro: Pyrus × fallax, also known as the hawthorn hybrid or the pear hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which have been traditionally used to support cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Pyrus × fallax include reducing blood pressure, improving circulation, and acting as a natural diuretic, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Pyrus × fallax is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used in combination with other herbs to create a range of herbal preparations.
